problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
mechanism: Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier
hypothesis: The key to Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway? is Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier — specifically Nanoparticle delivery to — which would help 2,100,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 33 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
